item.title: MoveTheSticks: Ian Rapoport reposteó Daniel Jeremiah @MoveTheSticks · 4min Ty Simpson to AZ feels inevitable. Cita Ian Rapoport @RapShe
item.description:
Ian Rapoport reposteó Daniel Jeremiah @MoveTheSticks · 4min Ty Simpson to AZ feels inevitable. Cita Ian Rapoport @RapSheet · 18min Sources: #AZCardinals QB Jacoby Brissett is not attending Phase 1 of the offseason program and is asking for an extension that pays him as the starter.
Brissett, set to make $9.06M in ‘26, has only $1.5M in guaranteed money and wants security. AZ appears willing to address it. 29 47 220 31 mil

item.title: robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 3min Jumping on with Alex now. You can either lose your own money betting the NHL Playoffs or
item.description:
Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 3min Jumping on with Alex now. You can either lose your own money betting the NHL Playoffs or you can tail me and probably also lose your own money but at least you have someone else to blame. Cita Hammer Betting Network @TheHammerHQ · 1h NHL Playoffs Mini Extravaganza w/ @alexjmoretto is now live!
Non stop Hockey bets for the next two hours
Join the conversation live on YouTube
https:// youtube.com/watch?v=Jv8Yp2 S5dsc …
Presented by: @FDSportsbook #FDPartner 2 7 472

item.title: NFLUKIRE: NFL UK & Ireland @NFLUKIRE · 3min How does the @Seahawks Super Bowl-winning defense operate between DC Aden Durde and
item.description: NFL UK & Ireland @NFLUKIRE · 3min How does the @Seahawks Super Bowl-winning defense operate between DC Aden Durde and HC Mike McDonald? 431

item.title: AdamSchefter: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7min The Texans recently picked up Will Anderson‘s fifth-year contract option and now are
item.description: Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 7min The Texans recently picked up Will Anderson‘s fifth-year contract option and now are locking up Anderson before he turns 25 in September. Cita Adam Schefter @AdamSchefter · 31min Source: Will Anderson is signing a three-year $150 million extension that makes him the highest paid non-quarterback in NFL history. The deal includes $134 million guaranteed. 32 18 190 62 mil
